name: Gregory Castellanos
description: The umbrella site for Gregory Castellanos, a Northern California founder, learning designer, executive function coach, AI evaluation specialist, event producer, and inventor.

areas.name: People
areas.purpose: Coaching and learning systems that help people build practical independence.
areas.intro: Executive function coaching, neurodiversity support, family collaboration, transition planning, academic support, and practical life systems.

areas.name: Ideas
areas.purpose: Turning complex ideas into clear plans, programs, and operating systems.
areas.intro: Strategy, program design, founder operations, community programs, partnerships, conservation concepts, and fundable project logic.

areas.name: Brands
areas.purpose: Making meaningful work easier to understand, explain, and trust.
areas.intro: Positioning, naming, messaging, websites, pitch materials, presentations, content systems, and launch direction.

areas.name: Technology
areas.purpose: Human-centered AI, evaluation, learning tools, and creative technology.
areas.intro: AI evaluation, AI literacy, prompt and output review, educational tools, digital systems, web tools, AV workflows, and responsible adoption.

areas.name: Experiences
areas.purpose: Events and gatherings shaped with sound, flow, hospitality, and calm production.
areas.intro: Corporate production, community events, retreats, fundraisers, radio, DJing, AV, stage management, and technical direction.

areas.name: Places
areas.purpose: Improving places so they feel more useful, welcoming, ready, and alive.
areas.intro: Place strategy, beautification, stewardship, guest readiness, hospitality systems, retreat environments, and practical activation.

work.name: Castellanos Coaching
work.overview: A dedicated coaching practice for executive function, independence, family support, transition planning, and practical capability.
work.situation: People and families often need a clearer way to organize growth without reducing a person to a problem.
work.contribution: Created the Castellanos Compass, connected education and coaching practice, shaped service language, and built a dedicated coaching destination.

work.name: Local Maker Mart
work.overview: A nonprofit community arts center and maker hub in North Beach, San Francisco.
work.situation: Creative local projects need systems that make participation, commerce, learning, and community feel connected.
work.contribution: Led facility acquisition, nonprofit setup, grants, partnerships, programming, volunteers, and maker education.
work.status: Legacy venture and reference point for current community-building work.

work.name: Recreation Sound Systems
work.overview: Patented sustainable audio technology and a production practice rooted in sound, design, and live operations.
work.situation: Events need more than gear. They need calm, preparation, good taste, and technical systems that support the human experience.
work.contribution: Developed resonance-based speaker technology, earned two U.S. patents, and connected product design with event production.

work.name: Recreation Experiences
work.overview: A broader experience platform for events, retreats, fundraisers, workshops, and community gatherings.
work.situation: People are hungry for gatherings that feel alive, well held, and intentionally designed.
work.contribution: Shapes concept, production, hospitality, sound, run-of-show, crew, and stakeholder coordination.
work.status: Active platform and evolving body of work.
work.privacy: Public venture with private project details withheld

work.name: AI You Trust
work.overview: A human-centered AI direction focused on evaluation, literacy, and tools people can use with judgment.
work.situation: AI can help people learn and create, but it can also make people feel overwhelmed or dependent.
work.contribution: Connects learning design, prompt evaluation, output review, harm awareness, and practical AI adoption.

work.name: Stay In The Light
work.overview: A retreat and gathering concept shaped around presence, hospitality, and place-based experience.
work.situation: A meaningful retreat needs a clear point of view, a trusted container, and careful attention to setting.
work.contribution: Connected idea, language, environment, flow, hospitality, and production planning into a coherent concept.
work.status: Concept and project material, with private location details protected.

work.name: Bodega Bay Hospitality Work
work.overview: Hospitality and property-readiness work connected to guest experience, organization, and practical improvement.
work.situation: A property can have real potential but still need stronger systems, clearer presentation, and better guest readiness.
work.role: Steward, organizer, strategist, hands-on problem solver
work.contribution: Supported practical improvements, spatial organization, guest-readiness thinking, and experience-led property care.
work.status: Selected private work described without owner or address details.
work.privacy: Private owner and location details withheld

work.name: Selectas Flow
work.overview: A radio and music platform connected to listening, curation, rhythm, community, and the culture of gathering.
work.situation: Music can create a shared field of attention and belonging when it is selected with care.
work.contribution: Brings music, story, community connection, and production experience together through a public radio context.

current: AI evaluation, AI literacy, and human-centered tool design.
Executive function coaching and practical independence systems.
Events, learning programs, and Castellanos Makes Places Better projects that bring people together well.
timeline: Two U.S. patents for resonance-based audio technology
Recreation Sound and live event production
Local Maker Mart nonprofit community arts center
Castellanos Coaching and executive function systems
AI evaluation, AI literacy, and tool development

speakingTopics: Education, project-based learning, and creative technology
